What happens to the body in high-pressure situations? Adrenaline gets released. So when your body releases excess adrenaline you naturally start to shake naturally because again there's so much adrenaline it's getting you ready for fight or flight. They're not called jumping jacks they're called star jumps and then do 20 star jumps. Go for a brisk five-minute walk before you go and give your presentation.
